title: Webinar Series Part-1 Opportunities and Challenges in 6G
subtitle: An informative webinar exploring the future of wireless communication, this session highlighted the opportunities and challenges of 6G technology. It provided valuable insights into technological evolution while encouraging innovation and research among students and academicians.
description:
Title of the event: Opportunities & challenges in 6G wireless technology 
 Objective: The objective of this event was to emphasize the significance and rapid growth of 6G wireless technology in today’s world. The webinar aimed to equip students and academicians with knowledge to explore research opportunities and drive innovation in wireless communication. It also provided an overview of the evolution of mobile generations in India, highlighting how advancements have shaped modern connectivity.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: Promote awareness and innovation in future communication.
Evolution of mobile generations in India
Enhanced understanding of next-gen wireless technologies
